Index JUIT Waknaghat Search Login Register x Home About Us About us Message from Management Message from Faculty In-Charge Present Team Past Team Code of Ethics Alumni Services Member Benefits Request Forms Distinguished Alumni Alumni Achievements Alumni Awards Directory News and Updates News & Updates Alumni Stories Events Upcoming Events Past Events Gallery Albums Videos Engage Jobs/Internships Scholarship Contact Us Event Details Home Events Upcoming Events Webinar by Suhail Sharma, IPS Go Back Jan, 29 2022 at 02:00 pm Online at GMeet Webinar by Suhail Sharma, IPS Suhail is an officer of the Indian Police Service (IPS), former Deputy Commissioner of Police in Mumbai, India. He has worked extensively on law and justice, women rights, juvenile delinquency, and disaster management. Having endured an avalanche on Mount Everest in 2015, he successfully scaled the peak in 2016 from the North Face. He achieved this rare feat on May 20 from the Tibet side of the north face of Mount Everest, which is considered as one of toughest climbs. While there are no expeditions for the IPS officer, for now, he mentors and guides mountaineers who aspire to climb Everest. He even trained a team of ten tribal kids from Maharashtra, five of whom achieved the feat. He also mentor enthusiastic young people who are interested in adventure activities. His warrior spirit is reflected in his professional life, as Sharma investigated the Govind Pansare murder in Kolhapur. Maintaining law and order in Naxal-affected Chandrapur is another noteworthy mention. About Us All who hail from the JUIT have set out on their own incredible journeys, building a life of success and enriching experiences.
